items.title: Follow up with Barak on US Bank meeting outcome
items.context: Email from barakp@opti.ai on May 10: 'BTW I'm meeting David @ US Bank on Tue Morning' — potential strategic LP/customer intro opportunity.

items.title: Follow up with Simone Garreau for Prism Layer review materials
items.context: Email from Jake on Apr 28: 'Can you please share the materials for our review?' — bumped again on May 8, unclear if materials received.

items.title: Prep for in-person meeting with Simone (Prism Layer) on May 26 at Fin Capital offices
items.context: Calendar event 'In-Person Meeting + Zoom | Simone Garreau (Prism Layer) + Fin Capital' on May 26 with Logan, Jake, Derek, Claire. Simone confirmed 10:30am in-person.

items.title: Prep for Blast Security follow-up call on May 14
items.context: Calendar event 'Teams: Fin Capital <> Blast Security' on May 14 at 9:30am ET with Boris Vaynberg (CEO), Richie, and Derek.

items.title: Prep for Reach Security follow-up meeting on May 14
items.context: Calendar event '[ZOOM] Follow-up: Reach Security <> Fin Capital' on May 14 with agenda: round dynamics, competitive advantages, Microsoft channel partnership, and financial services sales motion. Attendees include Logan, Fan, Derek, and Reach founders.
